argument_substitution.mechanism: $ARGUMENTS (all args), $ARGUMENTS[N] (Nth arg), $N (positional), ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID} and other env vars; shared with skills argument substitution

builtin_commands.mechanism: extensive set of built-in slash commands (/help, /clear, /compact, /config, /model, /mcp, /memory, /plan, etc.) plus bundled-skill commands (/batch, /debug, /loop); not user-modifiable

providerExtensions.name: Command File Format (.md in .claude/commands/)
providerExtensions.summary: Custom commands are .md files in .claude/commands/ (project) or ~/.claude/commands/ (user); filename becomes the slash command name.

providerExtensions.name: Built-In Commands
providerExtensions.summary: Roughly 60 built-in CLI commands (/clear, /compact, /config, /mcp, /memory, /plan, /agents, /skills, etc.); availability varies by platform and plan.

providerExtensions.name: Bundled Skill Commands
providerExtensions.summary: Some commands ship as bundled skills rather than CLI logic (/batch, /claude-api, /debug, /loop, /simplify); use the skill mechanism.

providerExtensions.name: MCP Prompt Commands
providerExtensions.summary: MCP server prompts appear as /mcp__<servername>__<promptname> slash commands (names normalized; spaces become underscores).

providerExtensions.name: Command Scopes (project, user)
providerExtensions.summary: Custom commands live in .claude/commands/ (project) or ~/.claude/commands/ (user); skills take precedence on name collision; symlinks supported.
